title: Golden Freddy Jumpscare
description: A horror mod. 1/10000 Chance for Golden Freddy Jumpscare every second cause why not?
body:
# 🤑Golden Freddy Jumpscare🤑

Every second you spend in the game, there is a 1/10,000 chance for Golden Freddy to jumpscare you. 
Imagine mining in a cave and you get jumpscared out of nowhere... I mean, why not?.



## 🤡Troll Your Friends With Command

If you don't want to wait for the random chance, or if you're just desperate to scare someone, use this command

/playjumpscare_fnaf play_golden_freddy_jumpscare {player}

  

## ⚙️Configuration

You can change the chance in config file
